title: 著名INGO美國人權基金會正發起眾籌，希望成立「香港專案小組」，全力打聯合國戰線。

replies.msg:
【#StandWithHK】其中一條最艱辛的國際戰線，應該是聯合國。為此，著名INGO美國人權基金會正發起眾籌，希望成立「香港專案小組」，全力打聯合國戰線。美國人權基金會多年來專注極權國家的人權狀況，近來集中積極香港議題，有心有力，請大家多多支持，廣傳開去。
UN is probably one of the most difficult battlefields in citizen diplomacy. Human Rights Foundation, a famous INGO, has launched a crowdfunding project trying to set up a “Hong Kong Desk” in the UN. HRF focuses on the human rights condition in totalitarian states and recently has closely followed-up on Hong Kong issues. Please support them and spread it out!

https://hrf-hk-desk.funraise.org/

The Human Rights Foundation (HRF) has carried a strong focus on Hong Kong since the beginning of the Umbrella Movement, recognizing the Hong Kong people’s fight for democratic values.

Our work in this area has included:

Featuring speakers and participants such as Denise Ho, Johnson Yeung, Badiucao, and Natalie Hui at the Oslo Freedom Forum

Establishing a working relationship with Hong Kong activists on-the-ground and around the world

Hiring a Hong Kong native to expand and manage legal advocacy in Hong Kong, mainland China, and Asia in a targeted fashion

Engaging in legal advocacy on behalf of Hong Kong political prisoners and persecuted dissidents

Publishing articles about Hong Kong on HRF’s Medium account
Filing petitions and urgent appeals before the UN Working Group on Arbitrary Detention on behalf of imprisoned Hong Kong activists

Filing an analysis on police brutality to the UN Special Rapporteur on the rights to freedom of peaceful assembly and of association

Launching publicity campaigns to support the pro-democracy movement in Hong Kong

The Hong Kong Desk’s programs will include:
A high-profile series of op-eds and articles investigating the Chinese Communist Party’s influence in Hong Kong
Increased international impact litigation with the UN Human Rights Council
Publicity campaigns to raise and maintain awareness of human rights violations in Hong Kong
Advocacy to hold perpetrators of human rights abuses in Hong Kong accountable

不如效法儒教祭祀烈士係一個地方設立總壇，另外家家戶戶好似拜祖先設祭壇
主要效果有2個
一動力信念 不忘初衷每日提醒自己追求五大訴求
二文宣教條 不斷創造反送中思想/原則/教規去實踐光復香港的願望
三實現生計 售賣反送中公仔/裝飾/靈牌/祭品(如道教的香/衣紙)

不斷去做最終就能好似儒家咁有大量講座/課程，養一大堆導師去教點樣每日不斷係生活上實現到五大訴求/攬炒，最終成為香港人生活的一大部分。下列就係例子但好似未夠系統化，無法話比人聽幾時邊刻做啲咩
